data.body: EVAL split + workflow cleanup (user). Evals in BOTH epics, scoped: 5fd2 = eval suite for NEW prompts (the plan-review criteria); 6f2d WS-EVAL-EXISTING = eval coverage for EXISTING migrated reviewer prompts (verify_completion/review_ticket/review_code/scan_spec), both drawn from DSO+snap+rebar via the shared eval seam (6f2d owns the seam infra). Added 6f2d WS-CLEANUP: retire weaker/undeveloped example workflows added to exercise the engine — INVENTORY shown to Joe: code_review.yaml (examples/, the e2e demonstrator) + the templates.py scaffold; reviewers reframed in code (review_workflows.py) not standalone YAML; NO strangler-fig example exists. Exact removal set pending Joe's selection. Both epics pass gates.
